---
title: "GSE131907 LUAD Tumor Microenvironment Reanalysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

project = Path("..").resolve()
docs = project / "docs"

def show_png(path, caption):
    p = docs / "figures" / path
    if p.exists():
        display(Markdown(f"![{caption}]({p.as_posix()})"))
    else:
        display(Markdown(f"*Missing figure: `{path}`*"))
```

## Overview

This report summarizes a sample-aware reanalysis scaffold for `GSE131907`, focused on lung adenocarcinoma tumor microenvironment composition across tissue sites.

## Sample Metadata

```{python}
path = docs / "tables" / "cell_counts_by_sample.csv"
if path.exists():
    display(pd.read_csv(path).head(20))
else:
    display(Markdown("*Run the analysis workflow to populate preview tables.*"))
```

## Composition Preview

```{python}
show_png("sample_counts_by_tissue.png", "Cell counts by sample and tissue")
show_png("celltype_composition_by_sample.png", "Cell type composition by sample")
show_png("top_celltypes_by_site.png", "Top cell types by tissue site")
```

## Planned TME Signatures

```{python}
path = docs / "tables" / "planned_tme_signatures.csv"
if path.exists():
    display(pd.read_csv(path))
else:
    display(Markdown("*Run `scripts/03_signature_plan.py` to populate signature definitions.*"))
```

## Limitations

This first version is annotation-first. Expression-matrix signature scoring and pseudo-bulk differential expression should be added only after careful memory-aware parsing of the GEO expression matrices.
